creator: kidon@posteo.de
text:
Building net/mosquitto (mosquitto-1.5.5) on FreeBSD 11.3 (amd64) with Poudriere fails due to a Clang error:

FAILED: src/CMakeFiles/mosquitto.dir/websockets.c.o 
/usr/bin/cc -DCMAKE -DVERSION=\"1.5.5\" -DWITH_BRIDGE -DWITH_BROKER -DWITH_EC -DWITH_MEMORY_TRACKING -DWITH_PERSISTENCE -DWITH_SOCKS -DWITH_SYS_TREE -DWITH_THREADING -DWITH_TLS -DWITH_TLS_PSK -DWITH_UUID -DWITH_WEBSOCKETS -I/usr/local/include -I/tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5 -I/tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5/src -I/tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5/lib -I/tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5/src/deps -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -MD -MT src/CMakeFiles/mosquitto.dir/websockets.c.o -MF src/CMakeFiles/mosquitto.dir/websockets.c.o.d -o src/CMakeFiles/mosquitto.dir/websockets.c.o   -c /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5/src/websockets.c
/tmp/ports/usr/ports/net/mosquitto/work/mosquitto-1.5.5/src/websockets.c:734:32: error: use of undeclared identifier 'AF_INET'
        if(listener->socket_domain == AF_INET){
                                      ^
1 error generated.

Build options:

[x] WS  MQTT over Websockets support
